title: convert_docs_to_okf
content:
# convert_docs_to_okf

Convert markdown documentation files to OKF v0.2 format.

## Docstring

Convert markdown documentation files to OKF v0.2 format.

Usage:
    python scripts/convert_docs_to_okf.py [--source docs] [--output docs/okfs/docs_bundle]

## Relationships

| Type | Target |
|------|--------|
| related | [extract_frontmatter](/convert_docs_to_okf/extract_frontmatter.md) |
| related | [infer_type_and_title](/convert_docs_to_okf/infer_type_and_title.md) |
| related | [build_tags](/convert_docs_to_okf/build_tags.md) |
| related | [extract_description](/convert_docs_to_okf/extract_description.md) |
| related | [convert_file](/convert_docs_to_okf/convert_file.md) |
| related | [generate_index](/convert_docs_to_okf/generate_index.md) |
| related | [generate_log](/convert_docs_to_okf/generate_log.md) |
| related | [get_git_info](/convert_docs_to_okf/get_git_info.md) |
| related | [main](/convert_docs_to_okf/main.md) |
